name: Beef Quiche with Parmesan Crust
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Mix flour and Parmesan cheese. Cut in butter until mixture resembles the size of small peas. Sprinkle with water. Mix with fork while adding more water to hold the mixture together. Roll and place into a 9-inch pie pan. Poke crust with fork along the bottom, and pinch edges together along the top. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 minutes.
Beef quiche: In skillet, saute beef, mushrooms, and onions in butter until onion is tender. Toss together cheese and flour. Sprinkle over beef mixture. Combine eggs, milk, and pepper sauce. Pour into pie shell. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes or until firm. Let sit about 5 minutes before serving.
